name: DevPort AB (publ)
summary: DevPort AB (publ) develops embedded systems in the areas of active safety/autonomous vehicle, hybridization, and infotainment focusing on the automotive industry in Sweden. The company develops software and hardware products. It also provides product development and design services in the areas of vehicle construction, machine design, tools, form and design, HMI, ergonomics, geometric fuse, testing, and electrical and cabling construction. In addition, the company offers production development services ranging from production, process, and flow optimization to processing, management, and quality assurance, as well as provides IT development services. It serves vehicle manufacturers and companies in the defense, life science, and other development-intensive industries. DevPort AB (publ) is headquartered in Gothenburg, Sweden.
